name: tunnel-mine-worked
summary: An active (or recently active) mining gallery — timber shoring, ore carts on rails, tool racks, bracing pillars.

primary_palette.note: vertical drop to a deeper level
sorting station with raw ore piles

story_prompts: workers fled mid-shift — tools still where they fell, a cart half-loaded
the vein ran into something that shouldn't have been there
abandoned decades ago and reopened by squatters
slave-labor operation, overseer's whip coiled on the sorting table
anti_patterns: timber bracing must line the walls regularly — mines don't hold themselves up
rails go in a continuous line, not scattered — cart path must be coherent
don't fill the tunnel full-width; leave a walking channel
